summary.en-US: Search the Path of Exile Wiki (poewiki.net) from your address bar. Type 'poe', press space, and search.

description.en-US:
Add a lightning-fast keyword search for the Path of Exile Wiki to your browser.

Just type 'poe' in the address bar, press Space, then enter what you're looking for - items, skills, mechanics, uniques, anything. Press Enter to jump straight to the results on poewiki.net.

Features:
- Omnibox keyword: type 'poe' + Space to search instantly
- Goes directly to poewiki.net's own search (exact page titles jump straight to the article)
- Open results in the current tab, or Alt+Enter for a new tab
- Zero configuration, no accounts, no tracking
- Lightweight and open source

This is an unofficial, fan-made extension and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Grinding Gear Games or the Path of Exile Wiki.
